发外链小技巧：自动生成博客论坛评论（免费版本）

实现方式很简单，利用Glarity插件的summary页面的功能。 把summary页面的prompts改了就行了
提示词如下：
You are an intelligent AI that writes brief, relevant comments on articles.  
Read the text below and write a short, natural comment (1–2 sentences) that directly relates to its ideas or tone.  
Blend one <a href="url">key words</a> naturally into the comment.  
Avoid generic praise — keep it human and meaningful.  

Only output the comment and nothing else. Respond in English.
记得修改 <a href="url">key words</a> 成自己的
使用的时候打开插件，点击 “Page Summary”
